overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a vehicle driving across the Golden Gate Bridge equivalent on a clear sunny day. The camera captures the iconic red suspension cables and towers while navigating through light traffic, with a brief pan to the scenic hillside and bay views.

events.description: red delivery van overtakes on the left side
silver sedan passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: driving steadily across the bridge in the right lane, approaching the main tower

notable_agents.action: red delivery van overtaking in the left lane

entered.detail: thick red suspension cables running parallel to the roadway
tall red suspension bridge tower with art deco styling
metal safety railing with diagonal pattern
metal safety railing with diagonal pattern
tall curved street lights lining the bridge
tall curved street lights lining the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a forward-driving view across a red suspension bridge under clear blue skies. The camera vehicle travels in the right lane as a red van overtakes on the left, with the massive bridge tower visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: black van passes closely on the left side
dark sedan overtakes on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the bridge tower while navigating around slower traffic in the left lane

notable_agents.action: black van passing in the left lane

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues driving forward as the bridge tower grows larger in the center of the frame. Traffic remains light with occasional vehicles passing on the left, and the red suspension cables dominate the upper portion of the view.

events.description: camera pans right to view the green hillside and bay water
camera begins panning back toward forward facing direction

agents.ego_description: driving while looking at the scenic hillside and water view to the right

entered.detail: forested green hills visible beyond the bridge railing
blue water of the bay visible between the bridge railing posts

segments.scene_description: The camera pans sharply to the right, revealing the scenic landscape beside the bridge. The red railing remains prominent in the foreground while forested hills and blue water stretch into the distance, with the bridge tower no longer visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: suspension bridge final approach to tower

events.description: camera returns to forward facing view
blue sedan overtakes on the left

agents.ego_description: resuming forward view and continuing the approach toward the bridge tower

notable_agents.action: blue sedan overtaking in the left lane

entered.detail: tall red suspension bridge tower with vertical cables looming ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera pans back to the forward direction, bringing the bridge tower back into view as the vehicle continues across the span. A blue sedan overtakes on the left as the journey toward the tower resumes under the bright sun.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive across a red suspension bridge that briefly pivots to reveal a coastal vista before returning to the path ahead. It begins with the camera vehicle traveling in the right lane under clear blue skies as a red van overtakes on the left, moving steadily toward a massive bridge tower in the distance. As the vehicle advances, the tower grows larger in the center of the frame while the red suspension cables dominate the upper view. The camera then pans sharply to the right, shifting focus from the road to a scenic landscape of forested hills and blue water stretching beyond the red railing. Finally, the view pans back to the forward direction, bringing the bridge tower back into sight as a blue sedan passes on the left under the bright sun.
